violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
The ice bagging area (considered an area of prep) is lacking a hand-washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
